name: Magic Numbers
description: Use of unexplained numeric literals in code instead of named constants.
symptoms: Numbers appearing in conditions without explanation
Same number repeated in multiple places
Comments needed to explain what numbers mean
consequences: Easy to miss related values when changing
example_good:
# Shipping constants
class ShippingConfig:
    LIGHT_WEIGHT_THRESHOLD = 5  # kg
    MEDIUM_WEIGHT_THRESHOLD = 20  # kg
    
    LIGHT_PACKAGE_BASE = 4.99
    MEDIUM_PACKAGE_BASE = 9.99
    HEAVY_PACKAGE_BASE = 14.99
    
    LONG_DISTANCE_THRESHOLD = 500  # km
    MEDIUM_DISTANCE_THRESHOLD = 100  # km
    
    LONG_DISTANCE_MULTIPLIER = 1.5
    MEDIUM_DISTANCE_MULTIPLIER = 1.2

# Discount eligibility
class DiscountConfig:
    SENIOR_AGE_THRESHOLD = 65
    LOYALTY_YEARS_THRESHOLD = 10

def calculate_shipping(weight, distance):
    config = ShippingConfig
    
    if weight < config.LIGHT_WEIGHT_THRESHOLD:
        base = config.LIGHT_PACKAGE_BASE
    elif weight < config.MEDIUM_WEIGHT_THRESHOLD:
        base = config.MEDIUM_PACKAGE_BASE
    else:
        base = config.HEAVY_PACKAGE_BASE
    
    if distance > config.LONG_DISTANCE_THRESHOLD:
        return base * config.LONG_DISTANCE_MULTIPLIER
    elif distance > config.MEDIUM_DISTANCE_THRESHOLD:
        return base * config.MEDIUM_DISTANCE_MULTIPLIER
    return base

def is_eligible_for_discount(age, years_member):
    config = DiscountConfig
    is_senior = age >= config.SENIOR_AGE_THRESHOLD
    is_loyal = years_member >= config.LOYALTY_YEARS_THRESHOLD
    return is_senior or is_loyal

refactoring_strategies.name: Extract Constant
refactoring_strategies.description: Replace magic number with named constant

refactoring_strategies.name: Configuration Class
refactoring_strategies.description: Group related constants in a configuration class

refactoring_strategies.name: Enum
refactoring_strategies.description: Use enums for discrete value sets

prevention: Always ask 'what does this number mean?'
Document the source of business values
Use linting rules to flag literals
